name: accordion
label: Accordion
description: A set of stacked, collapsible sections. Expand any number of items, or set `exclusive` to keep only one open. Pairs with <x-accordion.item>.
example:
<x-accordion>
    <x-accordion.item title="Is it accessible?" open>
        Yes. Each header is a real button.
    </x-accordion.item>
    <x-accordion.item title="Is it animated?">
        Yes — with a plugin-free CSS animation.
    </x-accordion.item>
</x-accordion>

props.name: exclusive
props.description: Allow only one item to be open at a time.

usage: Compose with <x-accordion.item title="..."> children; add `open` to start an item expanded, or pass a custom `icon`.
